N_PZ1A_SCU_UDS_PT_20210823

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 79D
Recv ID: 7BD
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 4D
Func Name: SCU

  {
    "diagversion": "16",
    "supplier": "1111",
    "soft": "11111111112222",
    "version": "1111111111222222"
